exception.message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: 'POST /element' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). Check the server log and/or the logcat output for more details (WARNING: The server did not provide any stacktrace information) Command duration or timeout: 19 milliseconds Build info: version: '2.53.1', revision: 'a36b8b1cd5757287168e54b817830adce9b0158d', time: '2016-06-30 19:26:09' System info: host: 'LAPTOP-3UV6SH1O', ip: '192.168.63.1', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '16.0.1' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Capabilities [{appPackage=io.appium.android.apis, statBarHeight=50, noReset=true, viewportRect={top=50, left=0, width=720, height=1230}, deviceName=89d3da547d04, platform=LINUX, deviceUDID=89d3da547d04, desired={appPackage=io.appium.android.apis, appActivity=.ApiDemos, noReset=true, platformVersion=7.1.2, automationName=Appium, platformName=Android, udid=89d3da547d04, deviceName=Redmi}, platformVersion=7.1.2, webStorageEnabled=false, automationName=Appium, takesScreenshot=true, javascriptEnabled=true, platformName=Android, udid=89d3da547d04, deviceApiLevel=25, deviceManufacturer=Xiaomi, deviceScreenSize=720x1280, networkConnectionEnabled=true, warnings={}, databaseEnabled=false, appActivity=.ApiDemos, pixelRatio=2, locationContextEnabled=false, deviceScreenDensity=320, deviceModel=Redmi 4A}] Session ID: 55ff6fe1-969b-4b4c-b579-808fc71e1257 *** Element info: {Using=id, value=io.appium.android.apis:id/notify_app}
